name: nl-tax-agent-skills
description: LLM-native Dutch individual income-tax Agent Skills for local annual-return and voorlopige-aanslag workpacks.

interface.shortDescription: Dutch tax workpack skills for annual return 2025 and voorlopige aanslag 2026.
interface.longDescription: A skills-only plugin that gives an LLM a structured local playbook for Dutch individual income-tax preparation. It guides intake, evidence indexing, source-backed reasoning, annual-return workpacks, provisional-assessment workpacks, field maps, and manual submission checklists without logging in, filing, signing, or handling DigiD credentials.
defaultPrompt: Prepare my 2025 Dutch annual tax workpack.
Index my Dutch tax evidence files.
